competitors.name: Screamin' Sicilian (Palermo's/Nestlé)
competitors.action: Launched limited-edition Buffalo Chicken pizza in March 2026 at Target and Kroger. Early consumer reviews average 4.5/5 on Influenster, praising tangy heat. Brand also rolling out recyclable packaging nationwide by summer 2026.
competitors.notes: Screamin' Sicilian continues aggressive flavor innovation in the premium frozen tier ($7-10). Buffalo chicken is a proven crowd-pleaser SKU. Real Dough competes in the same premium price tier but differentiates on sourdough authenticity vs bold-flavor gimmicks. The recyclable packaging move is worth watching — sustainability packaging could become table stakes.

competitors.name: How Ya Dough'n
competitors.action: Expanded from backyard startup to multi-state sourdough pizza brand. Featured in QSR Magazine as capitalizing on naturally fermented, clean-ingredient positioning.
competitors.notes: Direct competitor alert. How Ya Dough'n is telling essentially the same story as Real Dough — scrappy founders, sourdough fermentation, clean ingredients. Multi-state expansion means they're moving from local darling to regional threat. Real Dough's advantages: established brand system, larger SKU lineup, and Wisconsin manufacturing base. Worth monitoring their distribution footprint and retail placement closely.

competitors.name: Caulipower
competitors.action: Hit $100M+ annual sales milestone in Q1 2026, up 15% YoY per SPINS data. New BBQ Chicken flavor at Whole Foods and Publix. Partnering with HelloFresh for meal kit integrations starting April 2026.
competitors.notes: $100M milestone shows alternative-crust frozen pizza is a legitimate category. Caulipower owns the low-carb/keto lane; Real Dough owns the artisan fermentation lane. Different audiences, but both competing for the 'frozen pizza upgrade' shopper. The HelloFresh partnership is an interesting DTC/meal-kit channel play Real Dough could explore.

competitors.name: Conagra Brands (frozen segment)
competitors.action: Q3 FY2026 earnings: Refrigerated & Frozen segment net sales $1.1B, up 1.6% YoY with 3.6% organic growth driven by ~4% volume growth. 88% of frozen portfolio holding or gaining volume share. CEO cited 'upward inflection' in frozen categories.
competitors.notes: Conagra's frozen recovery signals the overall frozen food category is healthy and growing. Big CPG frozen investment means more consumer traffic in the frozen aisle — good for discovery of premium brands like Real Dough. However, Conagra's scale (they own multiple pizza brands) means more shelf competition and promotional pressure.

trends.topic: Frozen pizza/bread product safety — Bakkavor metal contamination recall
trends.magnitude: 25,796 cases recalled across 10 states; HelloFresh, Trader Joe's, Meijer affected
trends.context: Bakkavor's voluntary Class II recall for metal fragments in ready-to-eat pizza and bread products is the largest frozen pizza recall of 2026 so far. Affects HelloFresh Basil Pesto & Mozzarella Pizza, Frederik's by Meijer, Harris Teeter, and Fresh & Simple brands. No injuries reported. For Real Dough: not directly affected, but retail buyers may tighten quality/safety requirements across the category. Real Dough's own manufacturing control is a selling point in conversations with retail buyers post-recall.

trends.topic: JBS Greeley beef processing strike — supply chain disruption
trends.magnitude: Third week with no resolution; downstream food manufacturer impact growing
trends.context: The JBS Greeley strike is now in its third week, creating concerns for beef supply to food manufacturers. Not a direct frozen pizza input for Real Dough (pepperoni/sausage sourced differently), but signals broader labor unrest in food processing that could cascade. If meat prices spike, it could push consumers toward non-meat or premium-ingredient pizzas where they feel the value is clearer.

trends.topic: FDA pauses natural color approvals during reformulation season
trends.magnitude: Two approvals paused; timing disrupts spring product development cycles
trends.context: FDA has paused two natural color ingredient approvals right as CPG companies are mid-reformulation for clean-label initiatives. Creates uncertainty for brands switching from artificial to natural colorants. Real Dough already uses clean/simple ingredients, so this is a competitive advantage — competitors reformulating toward clean labels face delays while Real Dough is already there.

market_data.metric: Conagra Refrigerated & Frozen segment Q3 FY2026
market_data.value: $1.1B net sales, 3.6% organic growth, ~4% volume growth
market_data.change: +1.6% YoY; 88% of frozen portfolio holding/gaining share
Premium and alternative-crust segments leading growth

breaking.headline: Bakkavor recalls 25,796 cases of frozen pizza and bread for metal fragments
breaking.impact: Affects HelloFresh, Trader Joe's, Meijer, Harris Teeter across 10 states. Class II FDA recall. No injuries. Opportunity for Real Dough to emphasize manufacturing quality control in retail buyer conversations.
